title: AuthProvider unifies client construction and header injection into one trait
description: AuthProvider has two methods: build_client() and auth_header(). A future contributor might split these ('single responsibility'), but they are semantically coupled: the choice of auth mechanism determines both the TLS configuration and the credential injection strategy. CustomCaAuth sets a custom trust root in the client builder but injects no header. BearerAuth uses the default client but injects a token. Splitting the trait would make it impossible to express this correctly without pairing types externally. Keeping them together means one Box<dyn AuthProvider> covers the full auth contract.
close_reason: Decision record — current design is correct, no change needed
